form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Nowra Mdn-Sw on April 5 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 0.5 len behind Dancer's Delight with 59kg at $5. Has upside and not to be underestimated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Was well in the market at debut, 2nd in a small field at Nowra Mdn-Sw on April 5 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 0.5 len behind Dancer's Delight with 59kg at $5. Has upside and not to be underestimated.

form.formComment: Gelding by Toronado making his first appearance. Finished sixth in a Hawkesbury trial over 800m on February 24. Hasn't shown a great deal in trials leading up to this, later on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Toronado making his first appearance. Finished sixth in a Hawkesbury trial over 800m on February 24. Hasn't shown a great deal in trials leading up to this, later on.

form.formComment: Jason Attard trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Comfortable trial winner. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jason Attard trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Comfortable trial winner. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Queanbeyan Cl1 October 12 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Tommy Flyer with 55.5kg at $6. On debut eighth of 12 at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn-Sw September 27 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Gladstone Grande with 56.5kg at $15. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Queanbeyan Cl1 October 12 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Tommy Flyer with 55.5kg at $6. On debut eighth of 12 at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn-Sw September 27 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Gladstone Grande with 56.5kg at $15. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 48 day letup. First-up came from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Gosford Super Mdn on February 5 over 1000m, long-neck behind Charka with 59kg at $2.40. Second run from a spell 4th of 7 at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Hay Street carrying 58.5kg at $7.50. Best form stacks up nicely and finds a winnable race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third-up today. Resumes off a 48 day letup. First-up came from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Gosford Super Mdn on February 5 over 1000m, long-neck behind Charka with 59kg at $2.40. Second run from a spell 4th of 7 at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Hay Street carrying 58.5kg at $7.50. Best form stacks up nicely and finds a winnable race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly. Held up from rounding the home turn until passing the 200m.
Over-raced in the early and middle stages and proved difficult to settle.
On jumping, bumped by Pierro Lad. Between the 900m and 800m hampered by Pictor.
Jumped awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Melanite.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Queanbeyan Super Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1200m, a neck behind Hardly Fortunate with 57.5kg at $1.60. On debut fourth of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn October 16 over 1000m, 2 len behind Triple Play with 59kg at $15. Back for his second campaign and fitted with the one trial, respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Queanbeyan Super Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1200m, a neck behind Hardly Fortunate with 57.5kg at $1.60. On debut fourth of 7 at this track 3yo Mdn October 16 over 1000m, 2 len behind Triple Play with 59kg at $15. Back for his second campaign and fitted with the one trial, respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the middle stages.
Raced wide and without cover throughout.

form.formComment: At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 1.3 len behind Poisonous carrying 58.5kg at $16. Showed good speed on debut and can get across from the sticky gate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at this track Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 1.3 len behind Poisonous carrying 58.5kg at $16. Showed good speed on debut and can get across from the sticky gate.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming eased back early on second last in a small field at Sapphire Coast Mdn on March 1 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Eltrum with 56kg at $1.85. Last start ran last of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina with 55.5kg at $21. Needs to go to another level to match these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today. form.formComment: Filly by King's Legacy making her first race start. Trial form indicates she's up to a solid debut. Runner-up in a Hawkesbury trial over 1000m on March 23. Two good trials should have her ready for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by King's Legacy making her first race start. Trial form indicates she's up to a solid debut. Runner-up in a Hawkesbury trial over 1000m on March 23. Two good trials should have her ready for this.

form.formComment: Filly by Ole Kirk facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Scone trial over 900m on April 1. Looks a capable type sure to be competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Ole Kirk facing the starter for the first time. Ran 3rd in a Scone trial over 900m on April 1. Looks a capable type sure to be competitive.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start ran last in a small field at Tamworth 2yo Hcp on June 27 over 1000m, on a slow track; 19 len behind Song For Rosie carrying 56kg at $3.60. Returned from break second last of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina carrying 57kg at $101. Not keen.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Hellenic Belle with 56kg at $20. Hard to enthuse.
